channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nurse convicted in patient death now speaks nationally on hospital safety
item.description: RaDonda Vaught, convicted of negligent homicide for a medication error, now gives speeches on hospital safety in an era of heightened awareness.

item.title: Ebola cases rise in DR Congo amid distrust and armed conflict
item.description: Africa works to contain a fast-spreading Ebola outbreak threatening 10 countries as infections spread from eastern Congo into Uganda.

item.title: Anonymous cousins' surreal photos capture Afghan women's pain and dreams
item.description: The young women create photos exploring life under Taliban rule, contrasting reality with their aspirations. The exhibit is at Photoville.

item.title: Religious leaders and lawmakers seek $1 billion for house of worship security
item.description: A bipartisan effort on Capitol Hill aims to boost funding for the Nonprofit Security Grant Program, which helps houses of worship enhance their security.
